commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7266d82ec010064e46172fc5f7c584d27c0e7d27)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a doctor-repair upgrade scenario, a doctor-upgrade matrix profile with five legacy config states, a state-writing helper, surface coverage, and selfcheck coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR adds `channel-state`, while current main rejects any state trait not listed in `knownStateTraits`.
commands.review_followup: This member-authored PR needs maintainer handling for branch mergeability plus a small registry-validation fix before normal review can continue.

target.title: Add doctor upgrade coverage
target.body:
## Summary
- add a doctor-repair-upgrade scenario that clones a source env, applies legacy config, upgrades to the target, runs doctor --fix, then checks status/plugins/models/logs
- add doctor-upgrade profile with five legacy config states across core, plugin, provider, channel, and runtime-pin boundaries
- write state evidence markers citing recent OpenClaw PRs/issues/commits that explain why each profile detects breaking changes
- add catalog/selfcheck coverage for the new profile resolving all five obligations

## Verification
- node bin/kova.mjs plan --json
- node bin/kova.mjs matrix plan --profile doctor-upgrade --target local-build:/tmp/openclaw --json
- node bin/kova.mjs run --target local-build:/tmp/openclaw --scenario doctor-repair-upgrade --state legacy-core-config-doctor-2026-4-24 --source-env "Team Env" --report-dir /tmp --json
- git diff --check
- node --check support/write-doctor-upgrade-state.mjs

## Notes
- npm run check reaches and passes doctor-upgrade-plan-json, but the full self-check is red in this local environment because OCM is not installed/on PATH and setup/auth prerequisite checks fail before any real scenario execution.
- npm run test:snapshots is also red here because the committed report fixture artifacts referenced by the snapshot harness are absent locally; plan snapshots additionally reflect local OS/Node version drift.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
